name: dependency_audit
description:
Checks third-party packages for known CVEs and outdated versions using the OSV vulnerability database. Supports Python (requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, Pipfile), JavaScript (package.json), Go (go.mod), Java (pom.xml, build.gradle), and C++ (conanfile, vcpkg.json). No API key required.
Use when: user asks about vulnerable packages, CVEs, supply chain risk, or outdated dependencies.
Scope: local project directory — reads dependency files on disk.
Not for: secrets leaked in source code (use repo_scanner), code quality issues (use python_lint_checker), or GitHub Dependabot alerts from a remote repo (use dependabot_alerts).

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the project directory to scan. Example: '/Users/me/my-project'
